task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the correct patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS patient dashboard or chart is visible, displaying the name 'Clarinda Rolfson' and DOB '1980-11-16' (or corresponding age).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the interface to add a new allergy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page specifically for adding a new allergy is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct allergen was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Bee venom' (or 'Bee') is typed, searched, or selected in the 'Allergen' input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct reaction was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Hives' (or 'Urticaria') is typed, searched, or selected in the 'Reaction' input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct severity was selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Mild' option is selected, clicked, or checked in the 'Severity' section of the allergy form.

task_completion.description: Verify the allergy record was successfully saved to the patient's profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's clinical dashboard or allergy list displays the newly added active allergy, showing 'Bee venom' (Allergen), 'Mild' (Severity), and 'Hives' or 'Urticaria' (Reaction).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (e.g., Chrome/Firefox) navigating the OpenMRS SPA interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the standard OpenMRS SPA design (headers, menus, form layouts) and is not a local text editor or a blank HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the final result using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final allergy record appears naturally integrated into the UI without mismatched fonts, overlapping elements, or visible browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Clarinda Rolfson. Patient DOB: 1980-11-16. Expected Allergen: 'Bee venom' (or 'bee'). Expected Reaction: 'Hives' (or 'urticaria'). Expected Severity: 'Mild'.
